stats.title: 3 weeks
stats.body: Average time from starting with us to landing your first interview. Not months. Weeks.
Average salary increase our clients negotiate. That's not a typo. Most people leave money on the table. You won't.
Of our clients land a role within 60 days. We don't just coach — we get results.

pillars.title: This isn't about working harder. It's about working smarter.
pillars.subtitle: You've probably been told to 'just apply more' or 'network harder.' That advice is exhausting and mostly wrong. Here's what actually moves the needle:

items.title: Get clear on what you actually want
items.body: Stop applying to everything. We help you identify the exact roles where your experience translates to 'obviously qualified.'

items.title: Make your value impossible to miss
items.body: Your resume and LinkedIn should make recruiters think 'I need to talk to this person.' Not 'maybe.' Not 'let me think about it.'

items.title: Stop hoping and start executing
items.body: No more sending applications into the void. We build you a focused system that creates real conversations with real decision-makers.

proof.title: What changes when your story finally lands

items.title: Inbox looks different
items.body: Recruiters reach out to you. Hiring managers respond. Your calendar fills up with conversations that matter.

items.title: Interviews feel different
items.body: You walk in knowing exactly what to say. No more rambling. No more hoping you said the right thing.

items.title: Offers look different
items.body: You negotiate from strength, not desperation. You choose the role — it doesn't choose you.

success.title: Real people. Real breakthroughs.
success.subtitle: These aren't stock photos. These are people who were stuck, frustrated, and ready to give up — until something clicked.
success.body: Every one of them had the experience. What they needed was the right way to talk about it.

about.title: Why Askia exists
about.subtitle: Because talented people shouldn't feel invisible.
about.body: Here's what we've seen: smart, capable professionals who've led projects, shipped products, and solved real problems — completely stuck in their job search. Not because they lack skills. Because no one taught them how to talk about what they've done in a way that lands. That's the gap we close. We don't just polish your resume. We rebuild how you see yourself, how you talk about your work, and how you show up in every conversation.

coach.title: Meet Steve
coach.credential: Former engineering leader. Now career strategist.
coach.body: I've sat on the other side of the table. I've reviewed thousands of resumes, interviewed hundreds of candidates, and made hiring decisions at every level. I know exactly what makes someone stand out — and what makes them forgettable. I built Askia because I kept seeing the same pattern: incredible people getting passed over because they didn't know how to tell their story. Now I help them fix that.
bullets: Helped hundreds of professionals land roles they actually wanted
Direct experience hiring across tech, product, and leadership

program.title: Here's how we get you there

steps.title: Get crystal clear on what you're going after
steps.body: No more applying to 50 different roles hoping something sticks. We figure out exactly where your experience translates to 'perfect fit.'

steps.title: Rebuild how you present yourself
steps.body: Your resume and LinkedIn aren't working because they're listing tasks, not telling a story. We fix that.

steps.title: Stop spraying and praying
steps.body: Cold applications rarely work. We build you a focused outreach system that gets actual responses.

steps.title: Walk into interviews ready to win
steps.body: No more winging it. You'll have stories prepared, questions anticipated, and confidence that comes from actually being ready.

steps.title: Week 1: Strategy
steps.body: We get clear on exactly what you want, what you're worth, and what's been holding you back.

steps.title: Week 2: Rebuild
steps.body: Your resume, LinkedIn, and pitch get completely overhauled. You'll barely recognize them.

steps.title: Weeks 3-4: Launch
steps.body: You start having real conversations. We prep you for every interview and adjust as you go.

steps.title: Weeks 4-6: Close
steps.body: Offers come in. We help you evaluate, negotiate, and choose the right one.

cta.title: Your next role is closer than you think
cta.body: In 15 minutes, we'll identify exactly what's holding you back and give you a clear action plan. No sales pitch. If we can't help, we'll tell you.
cta.guarantee: Leave with clarity — or your next session is free
cta.proofSnippet: Join 847+ professionals who've accelerated their careers
